description: A tiny vintage coffee-carrying robot companion with warm worn enamel metal, spring limbs, and gentle steam.

idle.notes: Calm companion idle with tiny body sway, soft head nod, and gentle steam drift.

curious.notes: Small attentive head tilt and pause, as if Brew noticed something.

happy.notes: Warm restrained cheer with a tiny lift and soft cup-toast gesture.

sleep.notes: Drowsy coffee-break rest with gentle downward sink and softened steam.

coffee_break.notes: Compact sip-like support loop with cup raise, head dip, pause, and settle.

bounce.notes: Small buoyant happy bounce that keeps the cup stable.

low_energy.notes: Gentle tired droop support loop, not a dramatic failure state.

drag.notes: Directional drag reuses the true left-facing and right-facing careful walk rows.

sip.notes: The fixed atlas had no extra dedicated sip row, so the running support row was authored as a compact coffee-break sip loop.

bounce_support.notes: Extra support loop retained to fill the fixed atlas.

low_energy_support.notes: Extra support loop retained to fill the fixed atlas.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing walk row
right drag uses the true right-facing walk row
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, eyes, body, coffee cup, and gait all agree with travel direction
Brew remains readable at small size as a vintage coffee-carrying robot with antennae and visible steam
